# CWE-829: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-829-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"path/filepath"
	"plugin"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var allowedModules = map[string]struct{}{
	"reports.so": {},
	"metrics.so": {},
}

const moduleRoot = "/opt/app/modules"

// Safe: only allowlisted modules under a fixed directory may be loaded.
func LoadExtension(c *gin.Context) {
	name := c.Query("module")
	if _, ok := allowedModules[name]; !ok {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	full := filepath.Join(moduleRoot, filepath.Clean(name))
	if !filepath.HasPrefix(full, moduleRoot) {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
		return
	}
	p, err := plugin.Open(full)
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "load failed")
		return
	}
	sym, err := p.Lookup("Init")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, "init missing")
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"loaded": sym != nil})
}
